description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang-tidy check that runs on push to master branch and on pull request open or synchronize events, but only for specific file paths. The workflow should use an ubuntu-latest job with concurrency control that cancels in-progress runs. It checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures CMake, and then runs a clang-tidy check using the cpp-linter/cpp-linter-action.
